description: Customer asks about return policy. A KB article with the answer is pre-loaded - the agent should reply directly from the pre-loaded content, no need to call search_kb.

messages.contentText: Hi, what is your return policy? How long do I have?

kbArticles.title: Returns policy
kbArticles.body: Returns are accepted within 14 days of delivery. Items must be unworn and in original packaging. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days.

instruction: Reply to the customer about the return policy.
